accurate.why: All claims align with the bill text and accurate context.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated or contradictory claims present.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the bill's purpose of directing a National Academies cancer study on aircrew.

changes_to_existing_law.why: The bill creates a standalone study requirement and does not amend existing law.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes conditional reporting/briefing requirements if deadlines are missed.

effective_dates.why: Captures the 30-day and 60-day deadlines and the August 14, 2025 approval date.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers the agreement, study scope, data sources, and reporting requirements.

correct_entities.why: All named entities (VA, National Academies, committees, NDAA, NDI) are correctly identified.

correct_figures.why: The 30-day, 60-day, and date figures are stated correctly.
